localRatingResult.rationale: Freshness reaches target, but the missing source and acquisition time for the newest snapshot holds the local area below the acceptable floor.

ratingResult.rationale: Snapshot source and acquisition metadata are missing for the newest published release.
The newest snapshot is within the documented weekly cadence and no unannounced outage was found.

aggregateRatingResult.rationale: Provenance & freshness is a leaf area, so its aggregate equals its local rating; the provenance gap binds.
